client.name: Springfield Regional Medical Center
client.contact: Dr. Jane Smith, VP of Operations

project.name: IT Infrastructure Modernization
project.description: Comprehensive upgrade of network infrastructure, server consolidation, and cloud migration for the Springfield Regional Medical Center campus.

highlights: Full network audit and topology redesign
Server consolidation from 24 physical hosts to 6 + cloud overflow
Zero-downtime migration plan with rollback capability
24/7 monitoring and support for 90 days post-migration
